    C

    com.github.yellowstonegames.store.text - package com.github.yellowstonegames.store.text
     

    J

    JsonText - Class in com.github.yellowstonegames.store.text
     

    R

    registerAll(Json) - Static method in class com.github.yellowstonegames.store.text.JsonText
    Registers SquidText's classes with the given Json object, allowing it to read and write SquidText types.
    registerLanguage(Json) - Static method in class com.github.yellowstonegames.store.text.JsonText
    Registers Language with the given Json object, so Language can be written to and read from JSON.
    registerLanguageSentenceForm(Json) - Static method in class com.github.yellowstonegames.store.text.JsonText
    Registers Language.SentenceForm with the given Json object, so Language.SentenceForm can be written to and read from JSON.
    registerMnemonic(Json) - Static method in class com.github.yellowstonegames.store.text.JsonText
    Registers Mnemonic with the given Json object, so Mnemonic can be written to and read from JSON.
    registerTranslator(Json) - Static method in class com.github.yellowstonegames.store.text.JsonText
    Registers Translator with the given Json object, so Translator can be written to and read from JSON.
